speaker: Filippo
text: Now you have to tell me

speaker: Filippo
text: Giulia... you had promised me that our fights stayed between us (except your sister)

speaker: Filippo
text: I'll even tell you the date when you said it if you want since I had written it down

speaker: Filippo
text: and you can't say you forgot

speaker: Filippo
text: this time I can pretend nothing happened if you tell me what you talked about kindly but promises are kept

speaker: Filippo
text: and did you talk about it with anyone else besides your friends!?????

speaker: Filippo
text: You have to answer me. I can wait a bit but you have to answer all of this completely and without ignoring
